conversations.content: How much did I spend on shopping today?

<function_thought>
To determine how much Emma Johnson spent on shopping today, I will need to view her order history, as this will provide details about her purchases. This aligns with the initialized function trajectory plan, which involves calling the function to view order history.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[view_order_history()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

{'Order 1': {'order_id': 'ORDER-104674', 'product_name': 'Adidas Mens Z.n.e. T-Shirt', 'quantity': 1, 'order_date': '2024-04-18', 'delivery_date': '2024-04-20', 'product_id': 'P030'}, 'Order 2': {'order_id': 'ORDER-107495', 'product_name': 'TechBrand Precision Wireless Mouse', 'quantity': 1, 'order_date': '2024-05-06', 'delivery_date': '2024-05-10', 'product_id': 'P045'}, 'Order 3': {'order_id': 'ORDER-112543', 'product_name': 'Portable SSD 1TB', 'quantity': 1, 'order_date': '2024-05-19', 'delivery_date': '2024-05-19', 'product_id': 'P009'}, 'Order 4': {'order_id': 'ORDER-113219', 'product_name': 'SpeedStep Running Shoes', 'quantity': 1, 'order_date': '2024-05-19', 'delivery_date': None, 'product_id': 'P023'}}

<function_thought>
I have retrieved the order history for Emma Johnson. However, it appears that the orders are dated either in the future or far from today. Since today's date is April 18, 2024, it seems there are no purchases made today. Consequently, Emma has not spent any money on shopping today.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_current_day()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
The current day is May 19, 2024. By reviewing the order history, there were purchases made on this date:
1. Order 3: Portable SSD 1TB
2. Order 4: SpeedStep Running Shoes

However, I still need to check the individual order amounts to calculate the total spending for today.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_invoice(order_id="ORDER-112543"), get_invoice(order_id="ORDER-113219")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
